From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [National Military Park](/w/index.php?title=National_Military_Park&redirect=no "National Military Park"))

Military Parks of the United States

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/0b/Vicksburg-illinois-memorial.jpg/250px-Vicksburg-illinois-memorial.jpg)](/wiki/File:Vicksburg-illinois-memorial.jpg)

[Vicksburg National Military Park](/wiki/Vicksburg_National_Military_Park "Vicksburg National Military Park"), [Illinois Memorial](/wiki/Illinois_Memorial "Illinois Memorial")

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/e/e0/Kennesaw_mountain_cannon01.jpg/250px-Kennesaw_mountain_cannon01.jpg)](/wiki/File:Kennesaw_mountain_cannon01.jpg)

[Kennesaw Mountain National Battlefield Park](/wiki/Kennesaw_Mountain_National_Battlefield_Park "Kennesaw Mountain National Battlefield Park")

**National Military Park**, **National Battlefield**, **National Battlefield Park**, and **National Battlefield Site** are four designations for 25 battle sites preserved by the [United States federal government](/wiki/United_States_federal_government "United States federal government") because of their national importance. The designation applies to "sites where historic battles were fought on American soil during the armed conflicts that shaped the growth and development of the United States...."[[1]](#cite_note-1)

There are eleven National Battlefields (NB), nine National Military Parks (NMP), four National Battlefield Parks (NBP), and one National Battlefield Site (NBS). The National Park Service does not distinguish among the four designations in terms of their preservation or management policies.

Seventeen sites are from the [American Civil War](/wiki/American_Civil_War "American Civil War"), four from the [American Revolutionary War](/wiki/American_Revolutionary_War "American Revolutionary War"), one from the [War of 1812](/wiki/War_of_1812 "War of 1812"), one from the [French and Indian War](/wiki/French_and_Indian_War "French and Indian War"), and two were attacks on Native Americans. [Big Hole](/wiki/Big_Hole_National_Battlefield "Big Hole National Battlefield") is the only site in the [Western United States](/wiki/Western_United_States "Western United States").

In 1890, [Chickamauga and Chattanooga National Military Park](/wiki/Chickamauga_and_Chattanooga_National_Military_Park "Chickamauga and Chattanooga National Military Park") was the first such site created by [Congress](/wiki/United_States_Congress "United States Congress"). Originally these sites were maintained by the [War Department](/wiki/United_States_Department_of_War "United States Department of War"), but were transferred to the [National Park Service](/wiki/National_Park_Service "National Park Service") on August 10, 1933. The different designations appear to represent Congressional attitudes at the time of authorization of each individual site, although "park" appears to be reserved for the larger sites. Only [Brices Cross Roads National Battlefield Site](/wiki/Brices_Cross_Roads_National_Battlefield_Site "Brices Cross Roads National Battlefield Site"), which is small, still bears that designation; others have since been redesignated. Some battlefields are designated as National Monuments, such as [Little Bighorn Battlefield National Monument](/wiki/Little_Bighorn_Battlefield_National_Monument "Little Bighorn Battlefield National Monument"), [Mill Springs Battlefield National Monument](/wiki/Mill_Springs_Battlefield_National_Monument "Mill Springs Battlefield National Monument"), and ten forts, several of which saw battle; National Historical Parks, such as [Harpers Ferry National Historical Park](/wiki/Harpers_Ferry_National_Historical_Park "Harpers Ferry National Historical Park") and [Cedar Creek and Belle Grove National Historical Park](/wiki/Cedar_Creek_and_Belle_Grove_National_Historical_Park "Cedar Creek and Belle Grove National Historical Park"); or National Historic Sites, such as [Sand Creek Massacre National Historic Site](/wiki/Sand_Creek_Massacre_National_Historic_Site "Sand Creek Massacre National Historic Site").

As with all historic areas in the National Park System, these battle sites are automatically listed on the [National Register of Historic Places](/wiki/National_Register_of_Historic_Places "National Register of Historic Places").

## Other battlefields in the National Park System

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_military_park&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Other battlefields in the National Park System")]

### National Memorials

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_military_park&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: National Memorials")]

See also: [List of national memorials of the United States](/wiki/List_of_national_memorials_of_the_United_States "List of national memorials of the United States")

* [Arkansas Post National Memorial](/wiki/Arkansas_Post "Arkansas Post") preserves the site of battles in [1783](/wiki/Colbert_raid "Colbert raid") and [1863](/wiki/Battle_of_Arkansas_Post_(1863) "Battle of Arkansas Post (1863)")
* [Fort Caroline National Memorial](/wiki/Fort_Caroline_National_Memorial "Fort Caroline National Memorial") memorializes the [destruction of Fort Caroline](/wiki/Spanish_assault_on_French_Florida#Destruction_of_Fort_Caroline "Spanish assault on French Florida")
* [Pearl Harbor National Memorial](/wiki/Pearl_Harbor_National_Memorial "Pearl Harbor National Memorial") preserves sites related to the [Attack on Pearl Harbor](/wiki/Attack_on_Pearl_Harbor "Attack on Pearl Harbor")
* [Perry's Victory and International Peace Memorial](/wiki/Perry%27s_Victory_and_International_Peace_Memorial "Perry's Victory and International Peace Memorial") commemorates the [Battle of Lake Erie](/wiki/Battle_of_Lake_Erie "Battle of Lake Erie")

### National Monuments

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_military_park&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: National Monuments")]

See also: [List of national monuments of the United States](/wiki/List_of_national_monuments_of_the_United_States "List of national monuments of the United States")

* [Aleutian Islands World War II National Monument](/wiki/Aleutian_Islands_World_War_II_National_Monument "Aleutian Islands World War II National Monument") preserves the site of the [Battle of Attu](/wiki/Battle_of_Attu "Battle of Attu")
* [Canyon de Chelly National Monument](/wiki/Canyon_de_Chelly_National_Monument "Canyon de Chelly National Monument") preserves the site of the [Battle of Canyon de Chelly](/wiki/Battle_of_Canyon_de_Chelly "Battle of Canyon de Chelly")
* [Castillo de San Marcos National Monument](/wiki/Castillo_de_San_Marcos_National_Monument "Castillo de San Marcos National Monument") preserves a Spanish fort involved in numerous sieges
* [Fort Frederica National Monument](/wiki/Fort_Frederica_National_Monument "Fort Frederica National Monument") preserves the site of the [Battle of Bloody Marsh](/wiki/Battle_of_Bloody_Marsh "Battle of Bloody Marsh")
* [Fort McHenry National Monument](/wiki/Fort_McHenry_National_Monument "Fort McHenry National Monument") preserves Fort McHenry which played a crucial role in the [Battle of Baltimore](/wiki/Battle_of_Baltimore "Battle of Baltimore")
* [Fort Pulaski National Monument](/wiki/Fort_Pulaski_National_Monument "Fort Pulaski National Monument") preserves Fort Pulaski, site of the [Siege of Fort Pulaski](/wiki/Siege_of_Fort_Pulaski "Siege of Fort Pulaski")
* [Fort Stanwix National Monument](/wiki/Fort_Stanwix_National_Monument "Fort Stanwix National Monument") preserves Fort Stanwix, site of the [Siege of Fort Stanwix](/wiki/Siege_of_Fort_Stanwix "Siege of Fort Stanwix")
* [Little Bighorn Battlefield National Monument](/wiki/Little_Bighorn_Battlefield_National_Monument "Little Bighorn Battlefield National Monument") preserves the site of the [Battle of the Little Bighorn](/wiki/Battle_of_the_Little_Bighorn "Battle of the Little Bighorn")
* [Mill Springs Battlefield National Monument](/wiki/Mill_Springs_Battlefield_National_Monument "Mill Springs Battlefield National Monument") preserves the site of the [Battle of Mill Springs](/wiki/Battle_of_Mill_Springs "Battle of Mill Springs")
* [Pacific Islands Heritage Marine National Monument](/wiki/Pacific_Islands_Heritage_Marine_National_Monument "Pacific Islands Heritage Marine National Monument") includes [Wake Island](/wiki/Wake_Island "Wake Island"), site of the [Battle of Wake Island](/wiki/Battle_of_Wake_Island "Battle of Wake Island")
* [Papahānaumokuākea Marine National Monument](/wiki/Papah%C4%81naumoku%C4%81kea_Marine_National_Monument "Papahānaumokuākea Marine National Monument") includes [Midway Atoll](/wiki/Midway_Atoll "Midway Atoll"), involved in the [Battle of Midway](/wiki/Battle_of_Midway "Battle of Midway")

### National Historical Parks

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_military_park&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: National Historical Parks")]

See also: [National Historical Park](/wiki/National_Historical_Park "National Historical Park")

* [Appomattox Court House National Historical Park](/wiki/Appomattox_Court_House_National_Historical_Park "Appomattox Court House National Historical Park") preserves the site of the [Battle of Appomattox Court House](/wiki/Battle_of_Appomattox_Court_House "Battle of Appomattox Court House")
* [Boston National Historical Park](/wiki/Boston_National_Historical_Park "Boston National Historical Park") preserves several sites of the [American Revolutionary War](/wiki/American_Revolutionary_War "American Revolutionary War"), including the [Battle of Bunker Hill](/wiki/Battle_of_Bunker_Hill "Battle of Bunker Hill")
* [Cedar Creek and Belle Grove National Historical Park](/wiki/Cedar_Creek_and_Belle_Grove_National_Historical_Park "Cedar Creek and Belle Grove National Historical Park") preserves the site of the [Battle of Cedar Creek](/wiki/Battle_of_Cedar_Creek "Battle of Cedar Creek")
* [Colonial National Historical Park](/wiki/Colonial_National_Historical_Park "Colonial National Historical Park") preserves the site of the [Siege of Yorktown](/wiki/Siege_of_Yorktown "Siege of Yorktown")
* [Fort Sumter and Fort Moultrie National Historical Park](/wiki/Fort_Sumter_and_Fort_Moultrie_National_Historical_Park "Fort Sumter and Fort Moultrie National Historical Park") preserves [Fort Sumter](/wiki/Fort_Sumter "Fort Sumter") and [Fort Moultrie](/wiki/Fort_Moultrie "Fort Moultrie"), involved in battles including the [Battle of Fort Sumter](/wiki/Battle_of_Fort_Sumter "Battle of Fort Sumter") and the [Battle of Sullivan's Island](/wiki/Battle_of_Sullivan%27s_Island "Battle of Sullivan's Island")
* [George Rogers Clark National Historical Park](/wiki/George_Rogers_Clark_National_Historical_Park "George Rogers Clark National Historical Park") preserves the site of [Fort Sackville](/wiki/Fort_Sackville_(Vincennes) "Fort Sackville (Vincennes)"), site of the [Siege of Fort Sackville](/wiki/Siege_of_Fort_Sackville "Siege of Fort Sackville")
* [Harpers Ferry National Historical Park](/wiki/Harpers_Ferry_National_Historical_Park "Harpers Ferry National Historical Park") preserves [Harpers Ferry, West Virginia](/wiki/Harpers_Ferry,_West_Virginia "Harpers Ferry, West Virginia"), the site of [John Brown's Raid on Harpers Ferry](/wiki/John_Brown%27s_Raid_on_Harpers_Ferry "John Brown's Raid on Harpers Ferry") and the [Battle of Harpers Ferry](/wiki/Battle_of_Harpers_Ferry "Battle of Harpers Ferry")
* [Jean Lafitte National Historical Park](/wiki/Jean_Lafitte_National_Historical_Park "Jean Lafitte National Historical Park") preserves the [Chalmette Battlefield](/wiki/Chalmette_Battlefield "Chalmette Battlefield"), site of the [Battle of New Orleans](/wiki/Battle_of_New_Orleans "Battle of New Orleans")
* [Minute Man National Historical Park](/wiki/Minute_Man_National_Historical_Park "Minute Man National Historical Park") preserves sites related to the [Battles of Lexington and Concord](/wiki/Battles_of_Lexington_and_Concord "Battles of Lexington and Concord")
* [Nez Perce National Historical Park](/wiki/Nez_Perce_National_Historical_Park "Nez Perce National Historical Park") preserves sites of various battles of the [Nez Perce War](/wiki/Nez_Perce_War "Nez Perce War")
* [Palo Alto Battlefield National Historical Park](/wiki/Palo_Alto_Battlefield_National_Historical_Park "Palo Alto Battlefield National Historical Park") preserves the site of the [Battle of Palo Alto](/wiki/Battle_of_Palo_Alto "Battle of Palo Alto")
* [Pecos National Historical Park](/wiki/Pecos_National_Historical_Park "Pecos National Historical Park") preserves the [site](/wiki/Glorieta_Pass_Battlefield "Glorieta Pass Battlefield") of the [Battle of Glorieta Pass](/wiki/Battle_of_Glorieta_Pass "Battle of Glorieta Pass")
* [Saratoga National Historical Park](/wiki/Saratoga_National_Historical_Park "Saratoga National Historical Park") preserves the site of the [Battles of Saratoga](/wiki/Battles_of_Saratoga "Battles of Saratoga")
* [Sitka National Historical Park](/wiki/Sitka_National_Historical_Park "Sitka National Historical Park") preserves the site of the [Battle of Sitka](/wiki/Battle_of_Sitka "Battle of Sitka")
* [War in the Pacific National Historical Park](/wiki/War_in_the_Pacific_National_Historical_Park "War in the Pacific National Historical Park") preserves sites related to the [Battle of Guam (1944)](/wiki/Battle_of_Guam_(1944) "Battle of Guam (1944)")

### National Historic Sites

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_military_park&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: National Historic Sites")]

See also: [National Historic Site (United States)](/wiki/National_Historic_Site_(United_States) "National Historic Site (United States)")

* [Fallen Timbers Battlefield and Fort Miamis National Historic Site](/wiki/Fallen_Timbers_Battlefield_and_Fort_Miamis_National_Historic_Site "Fallen Timbers Battlefield and Fort Miamis National Historic Site") preserves the site of the [Battle of Fallen Timbers](/wiki/Battle_of_Fallen_Timbers "Battle of Fallen Timbers")
* [Fort Bowie National Historic Site](/wiki/Fort_Bowie_National_Historic_Site "Fort Bowie National Historic Site") preserves the site of the [Battle of Apache Pass](/wiki/Battle_of_Apache_Pass "Battle of Apache Pass")
* [Ninety Six National Historic Site](/wiki/Ninety_Six_National_Historic_Site "Ninety Six National Historic Site") preserves the site of [Siege of Savage's Old Fields](/wiki/Siege_of_Savage%27s_Old_Fields "Siege of Savage's Old Fields") and [Siege of Ninety Six](/wiki/Siege_of_Ninety_Six "Siege of Ninety Six")
* [Sand Creek Massacre National Historic Site](/wiki/Sand_Creek_Massacre_National_Historic_Site "Sand Creek Massacre National Historic Site") preserves the site of the [Sand Creek Massacre](/wiki/Sand_Creek_Massacre "Sand Creek Massacre")
* [Springfield Armory National Historic Site](/wiki/Springfield_Armory_National_Historic_Site "Springfield Armory National Historic Site") preserves the site of [Shays' Rebellion](/wiki/Shays%27_Rebellion "Shays' Rebellion")
* [Washita Battlefield National Historic Site](/wiki/Washita_Battlefield_National_Historic_Site "Washita Battlefield National Historic Site") preserves the site of the [Battle of Washita River](/wiki/Battle_of_Washita_River "Battle of Washita River")

### National Seashore

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_military_park&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: National Seashore")]

See also: [List of national lakeshores and seashores of the United States](/wiki/List_of_national_lakeshores_and_seashores_of_the_United_States "List of national lakeshores and seashores of the United States")

* [Gulf Islands National Seashore](/wiki/Gulf_Islands_National_Seashore "Gulf Islands National Seashore") includes [Fort Pickens](/wiki/Fort_Pickens "Fort Pickens") and the site of the [Battle of Santa Rosa Island](/wiki/Battle_of_Santa_Rosa_Island "Battle of Santa Rosa Island")

## Affiliated areas

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=National_military_park&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Affiliated areas")]

The following are affiliated areas of the National Park Services that are battlegrounds

* [Eutaw Springs Battlefield](/wiki/Eutaw_Springs_Battlefield "Eutaw Springs Battlefield") preserves the site of the [Battle of Eutaw Springs](/wiki/Battle_of_Eutaw_Springs "Battle of Eutaw Springs")
* [Kettle Creek Battlefield](/wiki/Kettle_Creek_Battlefield "Kettle Creek Battlefield") preserves the site of the [Battle of Kettle Creek](/wiki/Battle_of_Kettle_Creek "Battle of Kettle Creek")
* [Parkers Crossroads Battlefield](/wiki/Parkers_Crossroads_Battlefield "Parkers Crossroads Battlefield") preserves the site of the [Battle of Parker's Cross Roads](/wiki/Battle_of_Parker%27s_Cross_Roads "Battle of Parker's Cross Roads")
